turn_info.content:
I'm doing fine. 	My proble
m is that my boss keeps hitting on a co-worker, who really doesn't like the guy. What can I do to make it stop?

results.term: I've tried to bring it up with her indirectly, but...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I've tried to bring it up with her indirectly, but it's an uncomfortable issue, you know? She is really upset, and I don't know whether it's my place to handle this kind of thing. It's more of an HR issue, but should I go to HR? Will that help, or just get me in trouble? I don't know.

results.term: No, the company hasn't set up a system for passing...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: No, the company hasn't set up a system for passing along info that way. I don't know if she has talked to HR. She might not have because she's worried that it'll get back to her boss, and she'll get punished. I'd like to be supportive, even if I can't help solve the problem.

results.term: Thanks for your words of encouragement? Maybe ther...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thanks for your words of encouragement? Maybe there is little I can do, but I don't want to let the problem fester. She's a great co-worker and a great worker. We need her on the team. What do you think a good first step would be?

results.term: Sometimes we have lunch, but usually she just eats...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Sometimes we have lunch, but usually she just eats at her desk. I could easily send her texts of encouragement.

results.term: Ok. I'll try sending a couple of texts every day. ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Ok. I'll try sending a couple of texts every day. Then I'll see if she wants to have lunch outside with me when the weather gets better.

results.term: Thanks. The boss is pretty good at his job. He kno...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thanks. The boss is pretty good at his job. He know how to manage projects and he's good with clients. There is just this one thing that he gets wrong and somebody needs to get him to stop.

results.term: Thanks. I guess I just have to accept things as th...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thanks. I guess I just have to accept things as they are. I can't afford to leave this job, and it's impossible to find another job at this time. Plus I don't want to abandon my co-worker in her time of need.

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: True. I hadn't thought of it that way. I should consider my needs. Thanks!

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I feel a lot better now. I start sending text messages to my co-worker on Monday. Thanks! Have a good day!
